column1: # LED Orchestra controller node — 8 MB (ESP32-C6-WROOM-1-N8) partition layout.
# The deployment standardizes on N8 (8 MB) for controllers as well as LED nodes
# (see docs/led-node-flash-sizing-decision.md). The controller hosts a single
# `factory` app (it is the commissioner/provider; it is not itself OTA'd
# ota_0/ota_1 slots). The provider-on build (commissioner + Matter data-model
# server + OTA provider) is larger than the proven commissioner
# from 3.5 MB (4 MB layout) to 5 MB here
# reserve. Front matter (esp_secure_cert / nvs / nvs_keys / phy_init) is
# byte-identical to partitions.csv so provisioned credentials stay valid; paa_cert
